calendar.matters:
Petition For Order Removing Trustee, Confirming Appointment Of Successor Trustee And Surcharging Removed Trustee
Off Calendar Oct-22-2009 Granted Per Written Order

Petition For Order Removing Trustee, Confirming Appointment Of Successor Trustee And Surcharging Removed Trustee
Off Calendar Oct-05-2009 Continued To Oct-19-09 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: George Montgomery for Matthew Weinstein.

The Court stated that it was inclined to grant the petition and that the only issue was the surcharge. The Court continued the matter two weeks to October 19, 2009, stated that the matter would be taken under submission as of that date, and ordered Mr. Montgomery to submit a declaration in support of the the surcharge amount by October 14, 2009.

Judge Pro Temp: Sue M. Kaplan. Reporter: Arlene Howell, CSR#2542. Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda. Bailiff: Deputy F. Smith.
